privileged_info_summary: The receipt reconciliation task uses synthetic grocery receipt data with 20 items created in setup_task.sh. The CSV contains an intentional duplicate (Cherry Tomatoes appears twice at $4.99 each). The actual sum of all CSV prices is $118.97, not the claimed $119.67 as documented in README and verifier.py. When compared to the store's charged amount of $127.43, this produces an actual discrepancy of $8.46 (overcharge), not the claimed $7.76. The $0.70 difference between claimed and actual totals suggests an intentional pricing error in the data (as mentioned in task description), but the expected values documented in README.md, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py do not match the actual CSV data being used.
